chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-2013 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing 1. For order on CMA No. 5572/2025 2. For hearing of main case 18-03-2025 Mr. Farhatullah Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Per learned counsel for the Petitioner the letter dated 01.01.2024 available at page-81 has not been addressed as to date. Learned Assistant Advocate General states that the same shall be addressed expeditiously preferably within four weeks. In view hereof, learned counsel for the Petitioner states that the petition has served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad PS
